title: Evangelion 222 Fan trailer
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 2.22 Fan trailer             Quote Post by Gryphus_OnE » Thu Jul 08, 2010 6:32 am The maker of the awesome Rebuild of Evangelion 1.01 fan trailer that was posted here several months ago has released his new epic trailer for 2.22! His username in Youtube is tricofilms http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RK5hDzROLp0

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Thu Jul 08, 2010 9:09 am Not bad, i kinda missed the subs , his first one had that option.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Fri Jul 09, 2010 1:58 pm Here is mine http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ydvp5kYSqts

[]:             Quote Post by NatTheWriter » Fri Jul 09, 2010 2:02 pm This video has been removed by the user. Ouch. D:

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Jul 09, 2010 2:08 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Fri Jul 09, 2010 4:53 pm Thanks, i hear you.i'm gonna upload a second version with the audio fixed, the video program i used didnt allow more then 6db audio increase, so i had to lower the soundtrack, i fixed that outside of it. Only thing that suck is i'm getting deinterlaced jaggies lines in export, that sucks....

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Fri Jul 09, 2010 7:37 pm Now with subs i really think this trailer is amazing. A true talent there is.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Jul 10, 2010 2:33 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sun Jul 11, 2010 12:22 am bladerj wrote: Here is mine http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ydvp5kYSqts

[]:             Quote Post by IDontWantNoScrub » Mon Jul 12, 2010 7:15 am The tricofilms trailer has been removed due to copyright as well as many other 2.22 fan videos. Honestly, don't they have anything better to do? Grrr.

[]:             Quote Post by Gryphus_OnE » Mon Jul 12, 2010 8:27 am I think this RoE 1.01 fan op set to Ghost in the Shell's Rise works really well too here
